    failure_modes = [
        {
            "id": 1,

                "status counts, or max points, the SRM detail pages will display inaccurate "

            ),
            "affected_files": [
                "modules/Problems/services/ProblemsService.js",
                "modules/Problems/controllers/ProblemsController.js",
                "data/problems.json"
            ],
            "tests_to_design": [
                "Test that GET /api/v1/problems/:problemId returns aggregated language counts",
                "Test that GET /api/v1/problems/:problemId returns aggregated status counts",
                "Test that GET /api/v1/problems/:problemId returns max points correctly",
                "Test that GET /api/v1/problems/:problemId returns 404 JSON error when problem does not exist"
            ]
        }
    ]
